name: MCKESSON CORP
summary: McKesson Corporation, tracing roots to 1833, is a diversified healthcare services company operating four segments: U.S. Pharmaceutical (distribution of branded, generic, specialty, biosimilar, and OTC drugs), Prescription Technology Solutions (medication access and affordability technology), Medical-Surgical Solutions (supply distribution to healthcare providers offering 245,000+ products), and International (distribution and retail pharmacy services in Canada and Norway). McKesson serves pharmacies, hospitals, oncology practices, biopharma companies, and governments.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
